name: O-7 per-rule canary: --now <iso> pins the transition timestamp into rule_state_history for deterministic audits
command: mkdir -p tree rubric/fp-log && : > rubric/fp-log/g-ts-test.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to block --tree "$PWD/tree" --now 2026-05-30T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && grep -q 'timestamp: 2026-05-30T00:00:00Z' tree/google/x.yaml && echo timestamp_pinned 1>&2
